rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO ADVISORS LLC, FORMERLY KNOWN AS VS. KIT PATRICK JORY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Judgment
rulings.Rulings: The motion to amend the judgment is granted, no opposition having been filed. Petitioner has provided a form of amended judgment, but it must also provide a form of order granting the motion. The parties are directed to advise each other and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) whether or not they plan to appear to contest this tentative ruling. If a hearing is needed, it will be held in Department 204 of the San Francisco Superior Court Civic Center Courthouse at 1:30 p.m. Friday, January 30, 2015. Please note that this is a change in the courtroom.
